purpose: Kanban-style board grouping work items by Status (default) with inline edits and drag-and-drop.

feature_checks.feature: Route renders board with Status columns when /board?groupBy=status
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Navigate to /jira/core/projects/{key}/board?filter=&groupBy=status
feature_checks.expect: Page title ends with 'Board - {Space} - Jira'. Level-3 headings 'To Do', 'In Progress', 'Done' are present.

feature_checks.feature: Toolbar has a 'Search board' textbox
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Snapshot: role=textbox name='Search board'

feature_checks.feature: Typing in 'Search board' filters cards and persists in URL
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Fill 'Search board' with 'zzznomatch'. All columns show count 0; empty state heading 'No search results' with subtitle 'Try a different word, phrase or filter.' and a 'Clear' button.
feature_checks.notes: Search matches summary and description with a trailing wildcard. Clearing the textbox alone does NOT reset the URL filter; use the empty-state 'Clear' button or the X inside the search input.

feature_checks.feature: Online-users avatar (checkbox) appears next to search
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Snapshot: role=checkbox name='{User name} is online' with accountId value

feature_checks.feature: Filter button shows active count
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Snapshot: role=button name matches /^\d+ filters applied$/. Default is '0 filters applied'.

feature_checks.feature: Filter popover contents
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Click 'N filters applied'. Popover renders sections in order.
expect_sections: FILTERS (quick filters): 'Assigned to me', 'Due this week'
Assignee: avatar grid of space members
Priority: 5 icons (Highest, High, Medium, Low, Lowest)

feature_checks.feature: Group by button reflects current grouping
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Snapshot: role=button name='Group by {Field}'. Default name='Group by Status'.

feature_checks.feature: Group by options
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Click Group by. Popover shows 4 radios.

feature_checks.feature: Selecting a different Group by value swaps columns and updates the URL
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Open Group by → click 'Priority'. Toolbar button renames to 'Group by Priority'; URL query changes groupBy=status → groupBy=priority; column headings switch to ['Highest','High','Medium','Low','Lowest']; AUT-1 (priority=Medium) appears under Medium; card-actions button aria-name becomes 'Card actions on Task AUT-1 of the Medium column'. A new 'Save or reset view settings' button appears to the left of 'More actions'.
feature_checks.reverted_by: Open Group by → click 'Status'. Columns, URL, and card column reset to the original Status grouping.

feature_checks.feature: View settings opens a right-side panel
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Click 'View settings'. A right sidebar opens with heading 'View settings', a 'Resize sidebar' handle, and a 'Close' button.
feature_checks.notes: In this space the panel body rendered empty (no controls visible); likely premium-gated or feature-flagged.

feature_checks.feature: 'Save or reset view settings' button appears when current view differs from saved
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Change Group by (e.g. Status → Priority) or apply a search/filter; a new button role=button name='Save or reset view settings' appears between 'View settings' and 'More actions'.

feature_checks.feature: Board-level More actions menu
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Click 'More actions'. Menu items rendered.

feature_checks.feature: Default columns reflect statuses 'To Do', 'In Progress', 'Done' (when groupBy=status)
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Level-3 headings; each column header shows a count badge.

feature_checks.feature: Each column has a collapse toggle
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Snapshot: role=button name='Collapse {Status}' per column.

feature_checks.feature: Per-column More actions menu
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Click 'More actions for column {Status}'. Menu items rendered.
feature_checks.notes: 'Move column right' is replaced/augmented with 'Move column left' for non-leftmost columns (not directly verified).

feature_checks.feature: Each column has a '+ Create' button at the bottom that opens an inline create form
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Click 'Create' in a column. An inline form appears in that column with a textarea placeholder 'What needs to be done?', a type selector, a date picker, an assignee selector, and a submit (Enter) affordance. Escape dismisses it without persisting.
feature_checks.notes: Opened and cancelled in 'In Progress'; submission (which would persist) was intentionally skipped since the card cannot be removed from within the board (the card actions menu has no Delete).

feature_checks.feature: '+' button at the end of the columns row to add a new column/status
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Snapshot: rightmost unnamed role=button after the 'Done' column's Create.

feature_checks.feature: Card visually surfaces expected fields
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Inspect card for AUT-1.
feature_checks.notes: When status=Done, the key badge shows a green check mark next to AUT-1.

feature_checks.feature: Clicking the card opens the work item
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Snapshot: role=link name='{KEY} {summary}. Use the enter key to load the work item.' — Enter/click navigates to the work-item view.

feature_checks.feature: Inline 'Edit summary' pencil per card opens an in-card editor
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Click 'Edit summary'. The summary renders as a focused role=textbox name='Work item summary' with current value prefilled, accompanied by role=button 'Submit' (✓) and role=button 'Cancel' (X). Escape cancels and preserves the original text.
feature_checks.notes: Full edit-and-submit via automation was not completed: the textarea ref goes stale on every external action (live presence indicator re-renders the card), blocking browser_fill/browser_type. Manual keystrokes succeed but are flaky. Escape-to-cancel verified; original summary preserved.

feature_checks.feature: Priority icon opens inline priority picker
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Click the priority icon on the card. Popover lists 5 options, current selected is highlighted.

feature_checks.feature: Assignee avatar opens inline assignee picker
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Click 'Assignee: {name|None}' button on the card. A combobox role='Change assignee' opens a listbox with the options below.

options_include: other space members (e.g. fred, Worktrial-jonathan-yin, Kevin Yang)

feature_checks.feature: Assigning and unassigning persists through the inline picker
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Starting from 'Assignee: None': click the avatar → select 'Daniel Li (assign to me)'. Button aria-name flips to 'Assignee: Daniel Li' and the avatar renders the user's initials. Reopening the picker now lists 'Unassigned' as the first option (and hides the current assignee from the list).
feature_checks.reverted_by: Click 'Assignee: Daniel Li' → select 'Unassigned'. Button aria-name returns to 'Assignee: None' and avatar returns to the generic person icon.

feature_checks.feature: Card kebab opens actions menu
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Click 'Card actions on {Type} {KEY} of the {Status} column'.
feature_checks.notes: The menu has no Delete/Archive action; destructive removal requires opening the work-item view.

feature_checks.feature: Card actions → 'Change status' submenu transitions the card across columns
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Open card actions on AUT-1 → hover/click 'Change status'. Submenu lists the status buttons ['To Do','In Progress','Done'] with the current status highlighted. Selecting 'Done' moves the card out of 'To Do' (count: 1 → 0) and into 'Done' (count: 0 → 1); the card actions aria-name updates to 'Card actions on Task AUT-1 of the Done column'; the key badge gains a green check-mark glyph.
feature_checks.reverted_by: Re-open card actions on AUT-1 (now in Done) → Change status → 'To Do'. Column counts and card-actions aria-name return to the original state.

feature_checks.feature: 'Create work item after {KEY}' inline add button
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Snapshot: role=button name='Create work item after work item {KEY}' just above the card.

feature_checks.feature: Cards are draggable between columns to change status
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Drag card from 'To Do' to 'In Progress'; status updates and column counts refresh.
feature_checks.notes: Synthetic drag via the MCP (both element-to-element and coordinate-based) did NOT trigger the drop in this app — Jira's Kanban uses Atlassian pragmatic-drag-and-drop, which ignores purely scripted dragstart events. The underlying status-change mutation path is still exercised end-to-end via 'card.change_status_via_menu'.

feature_checks.feature: First-time 'Configure columns layout' coach-mark
feature_checks.how_to_verify: Hovering/clicking certain column controls surfaces a spotlight dialog with heading 'Configure columns layout' and an 'OK' button.
feature_checks.notes: Auto-triggered once during this run; non-blocking for automation but can intercept clicks.

known_gaps: View settings panel body rendered empty in this capture — verify with a premium seat or another space.
'Stand-up' and 'Configure columns' (board More actions) items were not activated (would open modals); only their presence in the menu is confirmed.
Drag-and-drop is ineffective via scripted events; use manual testing or a DnD-aware harness to cover that path.
Inline summary edit: submit-via-automation is blocked by a stale-ref loop caused by live presence re-renders; text-entry is verified to open but save path was only exercised manually.

Create-in-column and Create-after-card forms were opened and dismissed; actual submission was skipped because the board's card actions menu has no delete — cleanup would require opening the work item.

steps: Card actions on AUT-1 → Change status → Done
Verify: column counts (To Do 0 / Done 1), card moves to Done column, key badge gains check-mark
Card actions on AUT-1 (Done) → Change status → To Do
Click 'Assignee: None' on AUT-1 → pick '{Current user} (assign to me)'
Verify: button becomes 'Assignee: {User}', avatar renders user initials
Verify: URL groupBy=priority, columns [Highest, High, Medium, Low, Lowest], AUT-1 under Medium, 'Save or reset view settings' button appears
